description_long: This trailer is a modern, rectangular mobile home attached to a blue pickup truck. The trailer features a flat, light-colored roof and a mix of dark and wood-textured exterior wall panels. Large windows are present on both long sides, with a main entry door and several smaller windows providing ample natural light. The rear of the trailer has a wooden deck area that connects to the truck bed, and the front end is finished with a wood-textured panel and a small window. The overall design suggests a contemporary, transportable living space suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern rectangular trailer with large windows, wood and dark paneling, and a flat roof, attached to a blue pickup truck.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black exterior, main entry door, several windows, and the blue pickup truck attached.
description_view_1: Narrow end view with a wood-textured panel and a small window, showing the trailer's compact width.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a mix of wood and metal paneling, large windows, and the truck visible at the rear.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the wooden deck area, the back of the trailer, and the front of the blue pickup truck.
attribute_window_presence: five side windows, one end window
